title: Async Context, Logs, Metrics, Traces, Health, and Incident Evidence · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs async context, logs, metrics, traces, health, and incident evidence from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the bounded telemetry and health evidence contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded telemetry and health evidence contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Emit structured events with timestamp, severity, stable event name, bounded route, request and trace correlation, outcome, latency, and field-level redaction.
Define request, error, duration, saturation, queue, pool, event-loop, process, and business metrics with bounded labels and histogram semantics.
Create OpenTelemetry server spans with stable route names, span kind, method, status, error, network, server, propagation, sampling, and sensitive-data policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Structured Log Redaction · changed case · Review Structured Log Redaction
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 1150 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to emit bounded route telemetry and distinguish server errors from readiness capacity; retain a screen-reader-readable decision trace; then change the method and preserve both status and durable-effect evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Which action demonstrates Structured Log Redaction without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Structured Log Redaction · changed case · Review Structured Log Redaction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for emit structured events with timestamp, severity, stable event name, bounded route, request and trace correlation, outcome, latency, and field-level redaction. For Node and Express server Structured Log Redaction · changed case · Review Structured Log Redaction, keep Structured Log Redaction connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
